heading: Corporate Giving
intro: Partner with PYT and invest in the next generation of Bay Area performers. Corporate gifts are tax-deductible and come with year-round recognition.

tiers.name: Partner
tiers.description: Recognition on our website and in season programs, plus an invitation to a behind-the-scenes event.

tiers.name: Patron
tiers.description: All Partner benefits, plus logo placement on lobby signage and a group of complimentary tickets to a production of your choice.

tiers.name: Producer
tiers.description: All Patron benefits, plus prominent program advertising, on-stage recognition, and a reserved opening-night package.

tiers.name: Executive Producer
tiers.description: Our highest level of corporate partnership. All Producer benefits, plus season-long naming recognition and a tailored engagement package for your employees and clients.
